findings.description: Section s5 has an empty title and content "なし", but has no corresponding section in the source file. The source transitions directly from 「業務画面JSPを記述する際の制約事項」(h2) to 「ローカル表示の仕組み」(h2) with no intermediate section. The hints in s5 ("ローカル表示仕組み", "JSPパーサー") duplicate those already in s6, creating a spurious routing entry.
